title: Immutable Backup and Ransomware Recovery Readiness

compliance.assurance_rationale: ASD Essential Eight E8.08 Regular backups — immutable-backup and ransomware-recovery readiness evidences Maturity Level 3 of the regular-backups strategy.
APRA CPS 234 23 Incident management — ransomware-recovery readiness is specifically referenced in APRA guidance for information-security incident response.
PRA SS2/21 §9 Business continuity & exit plans — immutable/offsite backup readiness is a documented PRA expectation for severe-but-plausible disruptions.
